LSE-MS6-L4-6501000-MSSCI6-MCF-IMR-01  •  MS Science Grade 6  •  Body Systems as Interacting Subsystems

The Grandmother's Steps

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why are Abuela's legs and lungs both working extra?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain what the girl noticed, what the boy said is happening in two parts of her body, and what happened before the stairs that caused both. Use what you heard to support your answer.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS MS-LS1-3  |  MS Science Grade 6: Body Systems as Interacting Subsystems
